nodes.label: sanad-dark.png
nodes.description: Dark-theme screenshot of the Sanad application showing the Tasks view. The UI is a legal task management dashboard for Saudi legal and SME professionals, rendered in a dark color scheme (dark slate background, teal/green accent colors). Header shows 'Sanad — سند — Daily Operations' with clock, refresh, theme toggle, and user avatar. Left sidebar lists: Dashboard, Compliance (badge:4), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (active, badge:8), Documents. Sidebar footer notes: PWA-enabled, timer & UI state cached locally. Main panel shows Tasks heading with subtitle 'Daily to-dos + auto-generated follow-ups from document lifecycle events.' Filter tabs: All(8), Today(0), Overdue(0), Auto-generated(1). Five visible tasks: 'Update client on Gulf Pharma'(Urgent), 'Confirm hearing date – Family Inheritance Case #218'(High), 'Draft SPA revisions – Gulf Pharma M&A'(Urgent), 'Schedule GOSI payment'(High), 'Review MHRSD labor law update'(Normal). Footer: 'Sanad — Operational dashboard for Saudi legal & SME professionals | Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'.

nodes.label: Sanad Tasks View
nodes.description: The Tasks view in Sanad shows daily to-dos plus auto-generated follow-ups derived from document lifecycle events. Tasks are filterable by All, Today, Overdue, and Auto-generated. Each task has a priority label (Urgent/High/Normal), a due date with relative offset, and optional case/matter tag linking it to a specific legal matter.

nodes.label: Sanad Dark Theme
nodes.description: The dark theme variant of the Sanad UI uses a dark slate/charcoal background with teal-green accent colors for active nav items and primary action buttons. Badge counts appear in orange/amber. Priority labels use red (Urgent), amber (High), and gray (Normal). The header contains a theme toggle icon suggesting light/dark switching.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA Capability
nodes.description: The sidebar footer explicitly notes 'PWA-enabled. Install to desktop for daily access.' and 'Timer & UI state cached locally — minimal server load.' The app footer also confirms 'Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'. This reflects a design philosophy of running Sanad as a Progressive Web App on a home server with local caching for performance.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation Structure
nodes.description: The left sidebar navigation of Sanad contains six primary sections: Dashboard, Compliance (with alert badge), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (with task count badge), and Documents. This mirrors the main feature areas of a legal practice management tool. A user avatar circle sits at the bottom-left corner.
